timeline.brand_name: Center for Autism and Related Disorders (CARD)
timeline.notes: Blackstone acquired CARD, then the largest U.S. autism-therapy chain (~265 clinics at its peak).

timeline.brand_name: Center for Autism and Related Disorders (CARD)
timeline.notes: CARD filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, having closed 100+ of its locations.

timeline.brand_name: Center for Autism and Related Disorders (CARD)
timeline.notes: Bankruptcy court approved a $48.5M sale splitting CARD: founder Doreen Granpeesheh's Pantogran (~112 clinics) and Audax (15 clinics and 3 schools in Virginia). Blackstone exited.
